message:
refactor(storage): add optional fsync to atomic writes and migrate reservation archival to WBQ

- Add `sync` parameter to `atomic_write_bytes`, `write_text`, and `write_json`
  to allow callers to skip `sync_data()` for non-critical writes (e.g.,
  notification signals) while preserving durability for message bundles,
  reservations, and attachments.
- Improve temp file naming: use hash of target filename instead of raw
  filename string for shorter, collision-resistant temp names.
- Migrate file_reservations() resource handler from synchronous
  archive writes to WBQ (write batch queue) for released reservation
  artifacts, reducing latency on the hot path.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
